summary: The patient likely has a pilonidal sinus causing his symptoms; rotational flap surgery would provide better long-term outcomes by covering larger defects more securely than other methods listed here. Agent2 reasoned that among available surgical approaches, using a rotational flap technique offers superior results for managing this condition based on its size and nature. Rotational flaps allow effective reconstruction while minimizing complications such as infection or reoccurrence common with simpler procedures. Given the young male’s occupational risk factors involving sitting positions which can exacerbate conditions leading up to recurrent infections, addressing these through proper surgical intervention becomes crucial.
